overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The character traverses a waterfront promenade littered with debris, ascends a concrete staircase, and emerges into a vibrant neon-lit downtown district filled with holographic advertisements and towering digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy waterfront promenade with trash accumulation

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront promenade past piles of trash bags and debris

entered.detail: large vertical digital screen displaying red and white corporate logo
green metal railing separating walkway from water below
tall concrete wall with graffiti and weathered texture
cluster of blue and black garbage bags accumulated on the walkway
dark water reflecting city lights below the railing

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked waterfront promenade at night. The camera moves forward past a pile of trash bags against a graffiti-covered concrete wall, with a large red digital billboard visible in the distance and metal safety railing separating the path from the water below.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront walkway toward a staircase structure visible ahead

entered.detail: concrete staircase with red railings leading upward to street level

segments.scene_description: The walkway continues along the water with the trash pile now behind. An exterior staircase with red railings comes into view in the distance, marking the transition point to the upper street level. The red digital billboard remains visible but recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: exterior concrete staircase with red railings

events.description: begins ascending the wet concrete staircase with red handrails

agents.ego_description: climbing the steep concrete stairs while rain continues to fall

entered.detail: wet concrete steps with puddles reflecting overhead lights
weathered red painted metal handrails flanking the staircase
bright artificial light fixture illuminating the top of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a long concrete staircase with red handrails, transitioning from the open waterfront to a more enclosed space under an overpass. Overhead lighting illuminates the wet steps as the city lights become visible at the top of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown plaza with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits staircase into open neon-lit urban plaza with massive holographic displays
futuristic vehicles pass by on the adjacent illuminated roadway

agents.ego_description: walking through the vibrant downtown area surrounded by neon signs and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: walking along the wet sidewalk wearing casual clothing
futuristic red car driving along the neon-lit street

entered.detail: massive rotating circular hologram advertising corporate products
tall building facades covered in bright digital advertisements and neon signage
single palm tree silhouetted against the neon lights
futuristic elevated monorail track with glowing blue lights
towers covered in vibrant pink, blue, and white neon signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the scene opens into a dazzling neon-lit downtown plaza. A massive circular holographic display dominates the center while digital billboards cover the surrounding towers. The camera walks along the wet pavement past palm trees and other pedestrians, with futuristic vehicles driving along the adjacent road illuminated by vibrant neon reflections.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty, rain-soaked waterfront promenade into a dazzling, neon-lit downtown plaza. It begins by moving past trash bags and graffiti-covered walls along a wet walkway, with a distant red digital billboard guiding the path beside a metal safety railing. As the camera continues forward, the waterfront opens up to reveal an exterior staircase with red railings, which the viewer then ascends to transition from the open coast to an enclosed space beneath an overpass. The scene finally emerges from the stairs into a vibrant urban center dominated by a massive circular holographic display and towering digital billboards. The movement concludes with a walk across wet pavement past palm trees and pedestrians, surrounded by futuristic vehicles and vivid neon reflections.
